evals.prompt: I just wrote a Flask app and I want to test it in a clean environment before deploying. The app is in ./my-flask-app and has a Dockerfile. Can you spin up a test environment, build and run it, and confirm it's working?
evals.expected_output: Agent starts a docker playground, copies the app, builds and runs the container, verifies the app is responding, and cleans up the playground.

evals.prompt: I have some Kubernetes manifests in ./k8s/ that I need to test in a real cluster before pushing to prod. Can you set up a cluster and apply them so I can check if everything comes up healthy?
evals.expected_output: Agent starts a k3s playground, copies the manifests, applies them, checks pod/service status, reports results, and cleans up the playground.
